tasks.title: [Discord #general] Establish kanban workflow for all tasks
tasks.description:
Set up process to ensure all tasks from any channel are tracked on kanban board
- Auto-create tasks for every request
- Update status as work progresses
- Mark done when complete
- Use prefixes for context: [Discord], [DM], [Project X]

tasks.title: [Discord #general] ChipStack QA - Test Players/Games/Stats flows
tasks.description:
Navigate to chipstack-one.vercel.app
Test Players, Games, and Stats flows
Write report to workspace/chipstack-qa-report-v3.md
Assigned by dhsiao via Discord #general

tasks.title: [Discord #general] Add scheduled auto-archive for done tasks
tasks.description:
Set up Vercel Cron Jobs to auto-archive tasks in Done status for >7 days
- Configured in vercel.json
- Runs daily at midnight UTC
- Calls /api/tasks/archive?auto=true
Status: Completed by codex

tasks.title: Weekly memory maintenance automation
tasks.description: Created weekly-memory-maintenance.sh automation script. Analyzes MEMORY.md for duplicates/stale items, generates maintenance reports, and syncs to 2nd Brain. Found 1 duplicate constraint to review.
